name: Whole-Wheat Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. In a small bowl, sift together flour, baking soda, and salt; set aside.
3. In a large bowl, beat margarine, sugar, brown sugar, and vanilla until creamy.
4. Beat in egg.
5. Gradually beat in flour mixture.
6. Stir in chocolate chips.
7. Roll batter into balls (about 1 tablespoon each) and set 1 1/2 inches apart on an ungreased cookie sheet.
8. Bake 9-15 minutes until edges are golden brown.
Makes about 15 very big cookies.
